title: ^# ตอนที่ (\d+) (.+)$
body_required: Body paragraphs separated by blank line
(จบบท) at end of body
หมายเหตุการแปล: section after another ---
dialogue: 「...」 (full-width brackets, content inside, no space inside brackets)
system_message: 【...】 (full-width brackets, content inside, no space inside brackets)
paragraphs: separated by single blank line (\n\n), no trailing spaces
